content: which company is responsible for lean?

The Lean methodology was developed at Toyota Motor Corporation in the 1950s, but it has since been adopted by a wide range of industries and organizations around the world. Toyota continues to be a major proponent of the Lean methodology, but it is not the only company that has contributed to its development and implementation.
